service.name: Amadeus for Developers
service.description_for_ai: Leading travel API platform. Search flights, hotels, and points of interest. Used by major travel agencies and booking sites. Free test environment. Use for 'find cheap flights', 'flight prices', 'hotels in city', 'things to do in destination'.

auth.how_to_get: Register at https://developers.amadeus.com — free test environment available
auth.cost: Test: free with rate limits. Production: pay-per-call

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search available flights between two cities with prices. Returns list of flight offers sorted by price. Use for 'find flights from Moscow to Dubai', 'cheapest flights to Paris', 'round trip to London'.

originLocationCode.description: IATA airport code of origin. E.g. SVO (Moscow Sheremetyevo), JFK (New York), LHR (London Heathrow)

destinationLocationCode.description: IATA airport code of destination. E.g. DXB (Dubai), CDG (Paris), FCO (Rome)

returnDate.description: Return date for round trip YYYY-MM-DD

currencyCode.description: Price currency: USD, EUR, RUB etc.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Find airport IATA codes by city name. Use before flight_offers_search when user mentions a city name instead of airport code.
Find things to do, attractions, and restaurants near coordinates. Use for 'what to do in Rome', 'tourist attractions near me', 'restaurants in Paris'.

agent_hints.iata_flow: Always call airport_search first if user mentions city name. E.g. 'Moscow' → SVO/DME/VKO. Then use IATA code in flight_offers_search.
agent_hints.common_airports: Moscow: SVO/DME, St.Petersburg: LED, London: LHR/LGW, Paris: CDG, Dubai: DXB, Istanbul: IST, Bangkok: BKK, NYC: JFK/EWR
agent_hints.test_vs_prod: Test environment uses test.api.amadeus.com. Production uses api.amadeus.com. Prices in test are real but booking is not possible.
agent_hints.date_format: Always use YYYY-MM-DD format for dates. Never use natural language dates directly.
